item.name: Yak T'el Salamander
item.description:
Native to Iq Rrax Tsoly, this large amphibian is at home in the murkier depths of the cenote.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: This emerald-tinted giant is said to lurk in the depths with its great maw open, patiently waiting to ambush unsuspecting prey and swallow them whole.
